title: Add Hybrid category and new art studio business

requirements.text: Add 'Hybrid' as a new cuisine type option in the Restaurant type definition in backend/main.mo to categorize businesses that serve food/drinks but aren't traditional restaurants

quotes: Add a new 'Hybrid' category to the app for businesses that serve food/drinks but aren't traditional restaurants

acceptanceCriteria: The Restaurant type in backend/main.mo includes 'Hybrid' as a valid cuisine type
Existing cuisine filtering logic accommodates the new 'Hybrid' category

requirements.text: Add a new restaurant entry in backend/main.mo with the following details: name appropriate for the address, cuisine type 'Hybrid', address '2650 North Ave. unit 117 Grand Junction, CO 81501', coordinates approximately 39.0639°N 108.5506°W, description 'Serves dirty sodas, twisted teas, and snacks', isHiddenGem set to true, vibe attributes including art/crafts-focused, date night friendly, and family-friendly, and imageURL pointing to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/hybrid-art-studio.dim_800x600.png'

quotes: Address 2650 North Ave. unit 117 Grand Junction, CO 81501
Features: serves dirty, sodas, twisted teas, and snacks
Tag Hidden gym, art, and crafts, date night, family, friendly

acceptanceCriteria: The new restaurant appears in the backend restaurant list with all specified details
The restaurant has isHiddenGem set to true
Vibe attributes reflect art/crafts, date night, and family-friendly characteristics
The imageURL references the correct generated image path

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx to include 'Hybrid' as a cuisine filter button alongside existing cuisine options, maintaining the same visual style and toggle behavior

quotes: Add a new 'Hybrid' category to the app

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Hybrid' cuisine filter button appears in the SearchBar component
The button can be toggled on/off independently like other cuisine filters
The button styling matches existing cuisine filter buttons

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/hooks/useRestaurantSearch.ts to include 'Hybrid' in the cuisine filtering logic so restaurants with cuisine type 'Hybrid' are returned when the Hybrid filter is active

quotes: Add a new 'Hybrid' category to the app

acceptanceCriteria: When the 'Hybrid' cuisine filter is active, only restaurants with cuisine type 'Hybrid' are displayed
The 'Hybrid' filter works independently and in combination with other active filters

requirements.text: Render the generated hybrid art studio image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hybrid-art-studio.dim_800x600.png) as a static asset in frontend/src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx using the imageURL field from the new Hybrid restaurant entry

quotes: Image: a photo of a modern colorful art studio with a small bar area

acceptanceCriteria: The new Hybrid restaurant displays the generated art studio image
The image renders correctly in the RestaurantCard component using the imageURL field

constraints: Do not modify existing restaurant entries in backend/main.mo
Do not edit immutable frontend paths including useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, and components/ui
nonGoals: Modifying the existing cuisine type options beyond adding 'Hybrid'
Changing the visual design theme or color palette
Adding new vibe filters beyond those already specified

required: A photo of a modern colorful art studio with a small bar area serving drinks (hybrid-art-studio.dim_800x600.png)
